troparion: (Tone 6) Behold, this is the fearful day, O Lord,* whose evening we did not expect to reach;* but, in Your love, You grant that we may see it.* O holy Trinity, glory to You.
prokimenon: Let the hearts* that seek the Lord
Give thanks to the Lord, tell His name.
second_prokimenon: Blessed be the Lord,* God of Israel,
O give thanks to the Lord, for He is good.
